title: The Secure Base Hypothesis
why: The counterweight to the alarmist read. If fusion behaves like an attachment structure rather than a pathology, then the thing to change isn't the loyalty.
hook: If deeply loyal people trust outsiders more, not less, is the loyalty ever actually the problem?

reads.title: The fusion-secure base hypothesis
reads.source: Klein & Bastian, Pers Soc Psychol Rev

flagNote: Each of these quietly decides whose commitments count as legitimate.
